texto: A painting walks into the room supported by the collector. It is the painting of a nude by a contemporary artist. She is scarred by shadows from venetian blinds. “The ritual scarification of light and shadow,” I say. But am thinking, silently, the female nude is the self-ironization of the male. She, in his shadow, by design.
explicacao: Citação de Carla Harryman sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “A painting walks into the room supported by the collector. It is the painting of a nude by a cont…” articula reflexao, art, gender em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e gender.
